sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10052" key="a)ntikrate/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντικρᾰτέω</orth>, <sense id="n10052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hold, have instead of something else,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.298</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
